head.text: Boring pain behind right ear in mastoid process (Caps). Violent pulsation of arteries (Pothos; Glonoine). Painful pressure above the root of nose

stomach_abdomen.text: Persistent pressure in cardiac orifice. Vomiting

urinary.text: Cutting, burning in urethra. Tenesmus of bladder and rectum, with absence of stool and urine

keynotes.text: color="#800000">ONISCUS ASELLUS Wood-louse (MILLEPEDES) Has distinct diuretic properties; hence its use in dropsies. Asthmatic conditions, with bronchial catarrh.
